title: Pugs Waystones+
description: ya not like getting lost having all your shulkers in your base and losing them to not writing down the cords? well these waystones fix that
body:
So youve seen the waystones mod you downt know what to put in your modpack just download wyastones+ it fixes that issue  you should kno what your waystones do but now you can leave your shulkers at your base without worry about loosing your stuff if you loose your base wip out your warpstone and teleport back to your base in a zip.
